input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.3.3
            TITLE: when the accumulator containers are opened or segments are removed, the accumulator

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.3.3: When the Accumulator Containers are opened or Segments are removed, the Accumulator
EV.5.3.3 When the Accumulator Containers are opened or Segments are removed, the Accumulator 
Segments must be separated by using the Maintenance Plugs.  See EV.11.4.1

final_answer: When the Accumulator Containers are opened or Segments are removed, the Accumulator Segments must be separated by using the Maintenance Plugs. See EV.11.4.1
